title: witsenia ramosa
intro: Witsenia ramosa, also known as the "Cape fig marigold," is a plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Witsenia ramosa include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Witsenia ramosa can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
